title: GT2 HGP - Additional Stage 3 Nozzle Replacement
description: During hot gas path disassembly 8 of 24 stage 3 nozzle segments showed tip cracking beyond GE tolerance. Original scope assumed refurbishment only. GE LTP contract covers parts cost. Labor and additional outage days at Lone Star scope.

title: GT2 HGP - Combustion Liner Replacement All 14 Cans
description: Combustion liner burnthrough detected on 3 of 14 cans during disassembly. Replaced all 14 liners proactively to avoid repeat outage within 12-month period. GE parts cost covered under LTSA. Lone Star labor and scaffolding incremental cost.

title: Cooling Tower Basin - CT2 Concrete Repair
description: Unforeseen concrete spalling on CT-2 basin east wall 14 linear feet. Hydroblast spalled zone apply hydraulic cement bonding agent and polymer-modified repair mortar before epoxy recoating. Structural engineer review completed - no structural concern.

title: Inlet Air Chiller GT1 - Controls Integration
description: Additional GE Mark VIe controls integration required for new chiller capacity. Original scope assumed existing controls interface. New I/O cards and HMI screens required for expanded chiller monitoring and trip logic.
